arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot believes referee Stuart Atwell should explain why Tottenham matchwinner Lucas Bergvall was not sent off before scoring late on against the Reds

arts.ttl: Three reasons Ange Postecoglou was WRONG about Lucas Bergvall decision vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Tottenham star Lucas Bergvall was fortunate not to be sent off just minutes before he scored the only goal as Spurs took a first-leg lead in their Carabao Cup semi-final against Liverpool

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool star has no desire to leave the club in January transfer window
arts.sum: Some of the Liverpool players are facing an uncertain future at the club due to their contract situation. The Reds face the prospect of losing Mohamed Salah, Virgil Van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold for free at the end of the season. Both the teams have struggled to perform this season and their position in the league shows that. arts.ttl: Premier League fans send clear Archie Gray message after Tottenham ace shines against Liverpool
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur got the job done against Liverpool in the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final in North London. Neither Liverpool nor Tottenham managed to break the deadlock...
